rules_text.fr: Choisissez jusqu'à 2 de vos Pokémon Poing de Fusion. Pour chacun de ces Pokémon, cherchez dans votre deck une carte Énergie Poing de Fusion, puis attachez-la à ce Pokémon-là. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

rules_text.en: Draw 2 cards. If your opponent has exactly 1, 3, or 5 Prize cards remaining, draw 2 more cards.
rules_text.fr: Piochez 2 cartes. S'il reste exactement 1, 3 ou 5 cartes Récompense à votre adversaire, piochez 2 cartes supplémentaires.

rules_text.en: Draw 2 cards. If your opponent has exactly 2, 4, or 6 Prize cards remaining, draw 2 more cards.
rules_text.fr: Piochez 2 cartes. S'il reste exactement 2, 4 ou 6 cartes Récompense à votre adversaire, piochez 2 cartes supplémentaires.

rules_text.en: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 5 cards.
rules_text.fr: Mélangez votre main avec votre deck. Ensuite, piochez 5 cartes.

rules_text.en: Your opponent reveals their hand. Discard up to 2 in any combination of Pokémon Tool cards, Special Energy cards, and Stadium cards from it.
rules_text.fr: Votre adversaire dévoile sa main. Défaussez-en une combinaison d'un maximum de 2 cartes Outil Pokémon, cartes Énergie spéciale ou cartes Stade.

flavor_text.en: As each tail grows, its fur becomes more lustrous. When held, it feels slightly warm.
It stores electricity in its fluffy fleece. If it stores up too much, it will start to go bald in those patches.

rules_text.en: During this turn, your Fusion Strike Pokémon's attacks do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
rules_text.fr: Pendant ce tour, les attaques de vos Pokémon Poing de Fusion infligent 30 dégâts supplémentaires au Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire (avant application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).

rules_text.en: Once during each player's turn, that player may put a basic Energy card from their discard pile into their hand.
rules_text.fr: Une fois pendant le tour de chaque joueur, ce joueur peut ajouter à sa main une carte Énergie de base de sa pile de défausse.

flavor_text.en: As each tail grows, its fur becomes more lustrous. When held, it feels slightly warm.
It collects honey every day. It rubs honey onto the hairs on its legs to carry it back to its nest.
Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1,000-year curse.
Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1,000-year curse.

text.en: Search your deck for a {R} Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck une carte Énergie {R}, puis attachez-la à l'un de vos Pokémon. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: Extremely loyal, it will fearlessly bark at any opponent to protect its own Trainer from harm.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: A Pokémon that has long been admired for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.
Its body is made of magma. If it doesn't keep moving, its body will cool and harden.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. For each tails, discard an Energy from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Pour chaque côté pile, défaussez une Énergie de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Its body is as hot as lava and is always billowing. Flames will occasionally burst from its shell.

text.en: Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Attachez une carte Énergie de base de votre pile de défausse à l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.

flavor_text.en: When it shares the infinite energy it creates, that being's entire body will be overflowing with power.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est pile, cette attaque ne fait rien.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600 degrees Fahrenheit.

text.en: Discard up to 2 basic Energy cards from your hand. This attack does 60 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
text.fr: Défaussez jusqu'à 2 cartes Énergie de base de votre main. Cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts pour chaque carte défaussée de cette façon.

flavor_text.en: When it gets excited, embers rise from its head and tail and it gets hot. For some reason, it loves sweets.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Confus.

text.en: Your opponent reveals their hand. This attack does 40 damage for each Trainer card you find there.
text.fr: Votre adversaire dévoile sa main. Cette attaque inflige 40 dégâts pour chaque carte Dresseur que vous y trouvez.

flavor_text.en: It spouts poison spores from the top of its head. These spores cause pain all over if inhaled.

text.en: Your opponent reveals their hand. This attack does 70 damage for each Trainer card you find there.
text.fr: Votre adversaire dévoile sa main. Cette attaque inflige 70 dégâts pour chaque carte Dresseur que vous y trouvez.

text.en: Attach a {R} Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.
text.fr: Attachez une carte Énergie {R} de votre pile de défausse à ce Pokémon.

text.en: If this Pokémon has at least 3 extra Energy attached (in addition to this attack's cost), this attack also does 180 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Si au moins 3 Énergies supplémentaires sont attachées à ce Pokémon (en plus du coût de cette attaque), cette attaque inflige aussi 180 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: A flame serves as its tongue, melting through the hard shell of Durant so that Heatmor can devour their insides.

text.en: Put 5 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.
text.fr: Placez 5 marqueurs de dégâts sur les Pokémon de votre adversaire comme il vous plaît.

flavor_text.en: This Oricorio has drunk red nectar. If its Trainer gives the wrong order, this passionate Pokémon becomes fiercely angry.

text.en: Discard 2 {R} Energy from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez 2 Énergies {R} de ce Pokémon.

text.en: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.
text.fr: Pendant votre prochain tour, ce Pokémon ne peut pas attaquer.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned. During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Brûlé. Pendant votre prochain tour, ce Pokémon ne peut pas attaquer.

flavor_text.en: It wraps prey up with its heated body, cooking them in its coils. Once they're well-done, it will voraciously nibble them down to the last morsel.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Brûlé.

flavor_text.en: It wraps prey up with its heated body, cooking them in its coils. Once they're well-done, it will voraciously nibble them down to the last morsel.

text.en: During your next turn, this Pokémon's attacks do 90 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
text.fr: Pendant votre prochain tour, les attaques de ce Pokémon infligent 90 dégâts supplémentaires au Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire (avant application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).

flavor_text.en: While its burning body is already dangerous on its own, this excessively hostile Pokémon also has large and very sharp fangs.
While its burning body is already dangerous on its own, this excessively hostile Pokémon also has large and very sharp fangs.

text.en: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Impact Blow.
text.fr: Pendant votre prochain tour, ce Pokémon ne peut pas utiliser Coup à Impact.

flavor_text.en: It scatters poisonous spores and throws powerful punches while its foe is hampered by inhaled spores.
Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.

text.en: This attack also does 30 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 30 dégâts à 2 des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: Once it slams its shell shut, it is impossible to open, even by those with superior strength.

text.en: Attach a {W} Energy card from your hand to this Pokémon.
text.fr: Attachez une carte Énergie {W} de votre main à ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: No number of injuries can bother Staryu. Its amazing regenerative powers return it to its previous state in half a day!

text.en: Discard any amount of {W} Energy from this Pokémon. Then, for each Energy card you discarded in this way, choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and do 30 damage to it. (You can choose the same Pokémon more than once.) This damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.
text.fr: Défaussez autant d'Énergies {W} que vous le voulez de ce Pokémon. Ensuite, pour chaque carte Énergie défaussée de cette façon, choisissez l'un des Pokémon de votre adversaire et infligez-lui 30 dégâts. (Vous pouvez choisir le même Pokémon plusieurs fois.) Ces dégâts ne sont pas affectés par la Faiblesse ou la Résistance.

flavor_text.en: It rotates its geometrically shaped body to swim through the water. It always seems to be sending out mysterious radio waves.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Endormi.

text.en: Put all Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand. This attack does 100 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Ajoutez à votre main toutes les Énergies attachées à ce Pokémon. Cette attaque inflige 100 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: Crossing icy seas is no issue for this cold-resistant Pokémon. Its smooth skin is a little cool to the touch.
Its powerful, well-developed jaws are capable of crushing anything. Even its Trainer must be careful.
Once it bites down, it won't let go until it loses its fangs. New fangs quickly grow into place.

text.en: Discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez une Énergie du Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.

text.en: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

text.en: This attack does 20 damage for each of your Benched Pokémon that has the Let's All Rollout attack.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chacun de vos Pokémon de Banc ayant l'attaque Roulade Collégiale.

flavor_text.en: Even after Marill swims in a cold sea, its water- repellent fur dries almost as soon as Marill leaves the water. That's why this Pokémon is never cold.

text.en: Put up to 3 in any combination of Pokémon and Supporter cards from your discard pile into your hand.
text.fr: Ajoutez à votre main une combinaison d'un maximum de 3 cartes Pokémon et Supporter de votre pile de défausse.

flavor_text.en: The bubble-like pattern on its stomach helps it camouflage itself when it's in the water.

text.en: If this Pokémon was damaged by an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does that much more damage.
text.fr: Si ce Pokémon a subi les dégâts d'une attaque pendant le dernier tour de votre adversaire, cette attaque inflige en plus ce montant-là de dégâts.

text.en: Draw a card.
text.fr: Piochez une carte.

flavor_text.en: The small spikes covering its body developed from scales. They inject a toxin that causes fainting.

text.en: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Vous pouvez échanger ce Pokémon contre l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.

flavor_text.en: As it majestically swims, it doesn't care if Remoraid attach to it to scavenge for its leftovers.
To alert it, the fin on its head senses the flow of water. It has the strength to heft boulders.

text.en: Put an Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand.
text.fr: Ajoutez à votre main une Énergie attachée à ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Living on muddy ground that provides poor footing has made its legs sturdy.

text.en: This attack also does 20 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 20 dégâts à chacun de vos Pokémon de Banc. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: It can swim while towing a large ship. It bashes down foes with a swing of its thick arms.
Clamperl's pearls are exceedingly precious. They can be more than 10 times as costly as Shellder's pearls.
Deep seas are their habitat. According to tradition, when Huntail wash up onshore, something unfortunate will happen.

text.en: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Soignez 30 dégâts de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It sucks bodily fluids out of its prey. The leftover meat sinks to the seafloor, where it becomes food for other Pokémon.

text.en: Your opponent reveals their hand.
text.fr: Votre adversaire dévoile sa main.

flavor_text.en: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Endormi.

text.en: Your opponent reveals their hand. This attack does 60 damage for each Supporter card you find there.
text.fr: Votre adversaire dévoile sa main. Cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts pour chaque carte Supporter que vous y trouvez.

flavor_text.en: It prefers places with clean water. When its tuft runs low, it replenishes it by siphoning up water with its tail.
It's good at finding berries and gathers them from all over. It's kind enough to share them with friends.

text.en: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque marqueur de dégâts sur le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: Known for their violence, these Pokémon have the most fights with schools of red-striped Basculin.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est pile, ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 10 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: The colder they get, the more energetic they are. They freeze their breath to make snowballs, using them as ammo for playful snowball fights.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Endormi.

text.en: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack can be used for {W}.
text.fr: Si au moins un marqueur de dégâts est placé sur ce Pokémon, cette attaque peut être utilisée pour {W}.

flavor_text.en: Though it has a gentle disposition, it's also very strong. It will quickly freeze the snowball on its head before going for a headbutt.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 80 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 80 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: It moves around by jetting water from its right pincer. It has a poor sense of balance, so it's terrible at swimming straight.

text.en: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 50 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: Its right arm is packed with meat. When its pincer falls off, it's exported to be used as a cooking ingredient.

text.en: Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.
text.fr: Défaussez les 2 cartes du dessus du deck de votre adversaire.

text.en: This attack does 60 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque marqueur de dégâts sur le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: It's covered in a slime that keeps its skin moist, allowing it to stay on land for days without drying up.

text.en: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 20 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

text.en: You may put an Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand. If you do, this attack does 70 more damage.
text.fr: Vous pouvez ajouter à votre main une Énergie attachée à ce Pokémon. Dans ce cas, cette attaque inflige 70 dégâts supplémentaires.

text.en: You may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.
text.fr: Vous pouvez piocher des cartes jusqu'à en avoir 6 en main.

flavor_text.en: Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.
It starts off battles by attacking with its rock-hard horn, but as soon as the opponent flinches, this Pokémon bites down and never lets go.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 50 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon rapidly extends its retractable neck to sink its sharp fangs into distant enemies and take them down.
After it's eaten its fill, its movements become extremely sluggish. That's when Cramorant swallows it up.
It spins its tail fins to propel itself, surging forward at speeds of over 100 knots before ramming prey and spearing into them.

text.en: Search your deck for up to 2 {W} Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 2 cartes Énergie {W}, montrez-les, puis ajoutez-les à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: It eats snow that piles up on the ground. The more snow it eats, the bigger and more impressive the spikes on its back grow.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Endormi.

text.en: Put all Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand.
text.fr: Ajoutez à votre main toutes les Énergies attachées à ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It shows no mercy to any who desecrate fields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est pile, cette attaque ne fait rien.

flavor_text.en: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a Poké Ball, it has zapped many people.

text.en: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.
text.fr: Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont pas affectés par la Faiblesse ou la Résistance.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 90 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 90 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: It stores an overflowing amount of electric energy inside its body. Even a small shock makes it explode.

text.en: If 1 of your Minun used an attack during your last turn, this attack does 100 more damage.
text.fr: Si l'un de vos Négapi a utilisé une attaque pendant votre dernier tour, cette attaque inflige 100 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It absorbs electricity from telephone poles. It shorts out its body to create crackling noises.

text.en: Discard a {G} Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez une Énergie {G} du Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: Since this Pokémon makes its own clothes out of leaves, it is a popular mascot for fashion designers.

text.en: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 2 Pokémon de base, puis placez-les sur votre Banc. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: It cheers on friends. If its friends are losing, its body lets off more and more sparks.
All of its fur dazzles if danger is sensed. It flees while the foe is momentarily blinded.
Strong electricity courses through the tips of its sharp claws. A light scratch causes fainting in foes.
Luxray's ability to see through objects comes in handy when it's scouting for danger.

text.en: Discard all Pokémon Tools from all of your opponent's Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez tous les Outils Pokémon de tous les Pokémon de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: With a body made of plasma, it can inhabit all sorts of machines. It loves to surprise others.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Paralysé.

flavor_text.en: One alone can emit only a trickle of electricity, so a group of them gathers to unleash a powerful electric shock.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 20 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: These Pokémon have a big appetite. When they spot their prey, they attack it and paralyze it with electricity.

text.en: If this Pokémon evolved from Eelektrik during this turn, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
text.fr: Si ce Pokémon a évolué de Lampéroie pendant ce tour, le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Paralysé.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.
The sun powers this Pokémon's electricity generation. Interruption of that process stresses Helioptile to the point of weakness.

text.en: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 20 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: One Heliolisk basking in the sun with its frill outspread is all it would take to produce enough electricity to power a city.
